regulation: RED Directive 2014/53/EU - cybersecurity (Art. 3(3)(d-f), Del. Reg. (EU) 2022/30, EN 18031)
requirement: Internet-connected consumer radio equipment must demonstrate cybersecurity conformity to EN 18031-1/-2/-3 (network protection, privacy, no fraud). No CE mark without documented EN 18031 conformity from 1 Aug 2025.
gap: MotionSense Sensor is an internet-connected consumer radio device with no documented EN 18031 cybersecurity conformity, as required under RED Del. Reg. (EU) 2022/30 from 1 August 2025.
recommended_action: Commission a conformity assessment against EN 18031-1/-2/-3, update the technical file, and affix/renew the CE mark before 1 Aug 2025.

alert.message: HomePulse: your MotionSense Sensor needs RED Directive 2014/53/EU by 1 Aug 2025. Source: eur-lex.europa.eu

regulation: RED Directive 2014/53/EU - common charger (Art. 3(4), Del. Reg. 2022/2380)
requirement: Radio-enabled consumer electronics must use a USB-C charging port; micro-USB is no longer permitted.
gap: HomeHub Controller is a radio-enabled consumer device with a micro-USB charging port; USB-C is mandatory since 28 Dec 2024 under RED Del. Reg (EU) 2022/2380.
recommended_action: Redesign the charging port to USB-C and re-certify under RED before placing new stock on the EU market.

alert.message: HomePulse: your HomeHub Controller needs RED Directive 2014/53/EU by 28 Dec 2024. Source: eur-lex.europa.eu

regulation: REACH Regulation (EC) 1907/2006 - Annex XVII restriction (PFHxA group)
requirement: Products with PFHxA-group coatings above 0.1% w/w must not be placed on the EU market.
gap: PulseBand Activity Tracker contains the PFAS/PFHxA group substance above 0.1% w/w, which is restricted under the REACH SVHC Candidate List.
recommended_action: Remove the PFHxA-based coating or reformulate below 0.1% w/w and notify ECHA.

alert.message: FitTrack: your PulseBand Activity Tracker needs REACH Regulation (EC) 1907/2006 by 15 Mar 2027. Source: echa.europa.eu

regulation: Toy Safety Directive 2009/48/EC - DEHP/phthalate limits (Annex II Part III)
requirement: Toy electronics must not contain DEHP above 0.1% w/w of the plasticised material; tightened under the Toy Safety Directive revision.
gap: RoboPup Interactive Toy is a toy_electronic containing DEHP above 0.1% w/w, in violation of Toy Safety Directive 2009/48/EC Annex II Part III and REACH Annex XVII toy restrictions.
recommended_action: Reformulate soft plastics to remove DEHP below 0.1% w/w and re-test before next production run.

alert.message: PlayBright: your RoboPup Interactive Toy needs Toy Safety Directive 2009/48/EC by 1 Sep 2027. Source: eur-lex.europa.eu

requirement: EEE containing mercury above 0.1% w/w must be reformulated; legacy exemptions are lapsing.
gap: Legacy CCFL Panel (spare) contains mercury above the 0.1% w/w RoHS threshold; no current exemption covers this use.
recommended_action: Reformulate or discontinue the product; no new EEE containing mercury above threshold may be placed on the EU market.

alert.message: DisplayOne: your Legacy CCFL Panel (spare) needs RoHS Directive 2011/65/EU by 22 Jul 2027. Source: eur-lex.europa.eu

requirement: LMT batteries must carry a digital battery passport (QR + data carrier).
gap: e-Scooter Battery Pack 280Wh is an LMT battery sold in the EU with no digital battery passport or QR/data carrier, as required by Art. 77 of Reg (EU) 2023/1542.
recommended_action: Create the EU battery passport (QR + data carrier) and link it before the 2027-02-18 deadline.

alert.message: RideVolt: your e-Scooter Battery Pack 280Wh needs EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 by 18 Feb 2027. Source: eur-lex.europa.eu
